commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: For thou art also a Galilan. That Isaiah , by speaking in the idiom of the Galilans thou showest thyself to be a Galilan. The Arabic adds, And thy speech is similar to their speech.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: “You have taken my friends away from me.” In the passion of the cross, even my apostles fled from me; so completely did they shun me that Peter himself said: “I do not know this man.” Homilies of Saint , Homily

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
